kirundi.pick_a_destination_get_8_17_turns_to_s: Toranya aho ugiye. Ubona uruziga 8-17 kugira ngo urokoke ingaruka zayo mu gihe ukusanya siyansi. Buri ruziga ushiraho igabana ry'ingufu, urohereza, ibintu vyakozwe na AI biratangura, kandi utoranya uburyo abakozi bawe bazokwishura. Gutsinda = kurokoka inzira zose. Gutsindwa = O₂ canke ubwato bugera kuri zeru.
kirundi.engineer_medic_scientist_etc_unlock_a_: (injeniyeri, umuganga, umuhanga mu vya siyansi, n'ibindi) bafungura amahitamwo ya 4 ahishe igihe ibintu bihuye n'ubuhanga bwabo. Fyonda umukozi mu gihe c'ibintu kugira ngo ugishe impanuro.
kirundi.opens_once_you_have_50_science_permane: rifungura iyo ufite siyansi 50+. Kuvugurura guhoraho kugabanya ikoreshwa ry'ibikoresho canke kwugurura amahitamwo mashasha.
kirundi.life_science_shields_comms_lets_you_bi: (Ubuzima / Siyansi / Ingabo / Itumanaho) bigufasha kunamya ikoreshwa ry'ibikoresho buri ruziga. Icemezo mbere yo kohereza.
kirundi.tip_harder_destinations_give_more_scie: Impanuro: aho ugiye hagoye hatanga siyansi nyinshi. Mars n'Ukwezi ni ahantu ho gutangurira hizewe cane. Intsinzi, % nziza n'igiteranyo ca siyansi bikurikiranwa ku rugendo munsi ya buri kabuto.
kirundi.roguelike_missions_across_the_solar_sy: Ubutumwa bwa roguelike mu izuba ryacu. Buri gikino kigisha siyansi nshasha.
kirundi.each_pip_adds_1_science_at_event_resol: Buri ngingo yongeraho +1 siyansi mu gihe co gukemura ibintu.
kirundi.each_pip_mitigates_1_point_of_hull_dam: Buri ngingo igabanya ingingo 1 y'ivyangiritse ku bwato.
kirundi.3_pips_waives_wrong_specialty_consult_: Ingingo 3+ zikuraho igihano co kugisha impanuro ubuhanga butari bwo.
kirundi.consult_a_specialist_about_this_event: Gisha impanuro umuhanga ku vyerekeye iki kintu
kirundi.choose_your_response_press_1_2_or_3_to: Toranya igisubizo cawe. Fyonda 1, 2, canke 3 gutoranya.
kirundi.spacecraft_orbits_indefinitely_mission: Icogajuru kizenguruka igihe kitazwi. Ubutumwa burashoboka.
kirundi.eccentricity_too_high_leaves_system: Eccentricity iri hejuru cane — isiga sisitemu.
kirundi.adjust_sma_eccentricity_drag_widget_sh: Hindura SMA, eccentricity, gukurura. Widget yerekana ibisubizo 4 bitandukanye vy'uruziga. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.hypothesis_what_combination_produces_e: Iciyumviro: ni iyihe nguni itanga guhunga?
kirundi.find_two_stable_orbits_with_very_diffe: Shaka inziga ebyiri zihamye zifite SMA itandukanye cane.
kirundi.explain_how_sma_eccentricity_and_drag_: Sigura uburyo SMA, eccentricity na gukurura bigena hamwe iherezo ry'uruziga.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_state_orbital_m: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso c'uruziga gitandukanye c'imimerere 4; nta manota y'ubushobozi bwa lisansi; nta guhishura — ku bushake.
